languages.text: "Рискну заметить, что чувства — феномен интересный с точки зрения генетики и психологии, но ими не стоит руководствоваться для принятия рациональных решений".
"I would go so far as to say that feelings are an interesting phenomenon from the point of view of genetics and psychology, but they should not be used to guide rational decision-making."
languages.original_text: "Рискну заметить, что чувства — феномен интересный с точки зрения генетики и психологии, но ими не стоит руководствоваться для принятия рациональных решений".

traits.locale_text: "I would go so far as to say that feelings are an interesting phenomenon from the point of view of genetics and psychology, but they should not be used to guide rational decision-making."
"I would go so far as to say that feelings are an interesting phenomenon from the point of view of genetics and psychology, but they should not be used to guide rational decision-making."
"I would go so far as to say that feelings are an interesting phenomenon from the point of view of genetics and psychology, but they should not be used to guide rational decision-making."

languages.text: «Me limitaré a decir que las emociones son un fenómeno interesante desde el punto de vista de la genética y la psicología, pero que no deberían imponerse a la razón en lo que respecta a la toma de decisiones».
languages.original_text: "I would go so far as to say that feelings are an interesting phenomenon from the point of view of genetics and psychology, but they should not be used to guide rational decision-making."

traits.locale_text: «Me limitaré a decir que las emociones son un fenómeno interesante desde el punto de vista de la genética y la psicología, pero que no deberían imponerse a la razón en lo que respecta a la toma de decisiones».

languages.text: “我甚至愿意承认，从遗传学和心理学的角度来看，情感的确是很有趣的现象，但绝不该用它来指导理性的决策。”
languages.original_text: "I would go so far as to say that feelings are an interesting phenomenon from the point of view of genetics and psychology, but they should not be used to guide rational decision-making."

traits.locale_text: “我甚至愿意承认，从遗传学和心理学的角度来看，情感的确是很有趣的现象，但绝不该用它来指导理性的决策。”

languages.text: « J'irais même jusqu'à dire que les sentiments sont un phénomène intéressant sur le plan génétique et psychologique, mais qu'ils ne doivent pas être un facteur d'influence dans une prise de décision rationnelle. »
languages.original_text: "I would go so far as to say that feelings are an interesting phenomenon from the point of view of genetics and psychology, but they should not be used to guide rational decision-making."

traits.locale_text: « J'irais même jusqu'à dire que les sentiments sont un phénomène intéressant sur le plan génétique et psychologique, mais qu'ils ne doivent pas être un facteur d'influence dans une prise de décision rationnelle. »

languages.text: "Duyguların, genetik ve psikoloji açısından ilginç bir fenomen olduğunu söyleyebilirim ancak rasyonel karar alma süreçlerine rehberlik edecek şekilde kullanılmamalıdırlar."
languages.original_text: "I would go so far as to say that feelings are an interesting phenomenon from the point of view of genetics and psychology, but they should not be used to guide rational decision-making."

traits.locale_text: "Duyguların, genetik ve psikoloji açısından ilginç bir fenomen olduğunu söyleyebilirim ancak rasyonel karar alma süreçlerine rehberlik edecek şekilde kullanılmamalıdırlar."

languages.text: 「あえて言えば、感情とは遺伝学および心理学の観点から見て興味深い現象ではありますが、合理的な意思決定の指針として用いるべきではありません」
languages.original_text: "I would go so far as to say that feelings are an interesting phenomenon from the point of view of genetics and psychology, but they should not be used to guide rational decision-making."

traits.locale_text: 「あえて言えば、感情とは遺伝学および心理学の観点から見て興味深い現象ではありますが、合理的な意思決定の指針として用いるべきではありません」

languages.text: "Ich würde so weit gehen, zu sagen, dass Gefühle aus genetischer und psychologischer Sicht ein interessantes Phänomen sind, aber bei rationalen Entscheidungen keine Rolle spielen sollten."
languages.original_text: "I would go so far as to say that feelings are an interesting phenomenon from the point of view of genetics and psychology, but they should not be used to guide rational decision-making."

traits.locale_text: "Ich würde so weit gehen, zu sagen, dass Gefühle aus genetischer und psychologischer Sicht ein interessantes Phänomen sind, aber bei rationalen Entscheidungen keine Rolle spielen sollten."
